raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current focus","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Opens up the conversation by allowing Bill to share his current focus or concerns.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Workload adjustment","name":"How is your workload feeling since your injury?","description":"Probes how Bill is managing his workload post-injury and if adjustments are needed.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Skill focus during recovery","name":"What skills do you feel you can focus on while recovering?","description":"Explores areas for skills development during Bill's recovery period.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Support needs","name":"What support do you think you need from me during your recovery?","description":"Opens a discussion on how the manager can support Bill during his recovery.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Role clarity","name":"What part of your role or expectations feels unclear right now?","description":"Identifies areas where Bill might need more clarity in his role.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Feedback on past projects","name":"How did you find the feedback on your projects before your injury?","description":"Checks how Bill received and processed feedback on past projects.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Motivation post-injury","name":"What's keeping you motivated as you return to work?","description":"Explores what aspects of work are keeping Bill engaged post-injury.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Energy levels","name":"How's your energy at work on a typical day lately?","description":"Evaluates Bill's energy levels to ensure he is not overexerting himself post-injury.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Manager feedback","name":"Is there any feedback you need from me that you haven't received yet?","description":"Encourages Bill to express any need for additional feedback from his manager.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Learning resources","name":"Are there any learning resources you think would help your growth right now?","description":"Identifies resources that could aid Bill's development during recovery.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]}]}
